title: thelypteris polyptera
intro: Thelypteris polyptera, also known as the forked spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Thelypteris polyptera include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and kidney stones, as well as its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Thelypteris polyptera include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
